name: Dinefwr Park & Castle (NT)
terrain: Parkland tracks, boardwalk, some steps to castle
dog_lead_policy: On lead in castle precinct, off-lead on main loop
highlights: Medieval castle above meandering Tywi — white cattle, fallow deer and bog boardwalks.
points_of_interest: Dinefwr Castle (Cadw/NT); Newton House; White Park cattle; fallow deer herd
viewpoints: Castle ramparts with Tywi meander view; Black Mountain on horizon
picnic_spots: Castle lawn or parkland picnic area
parking_start: NT Newton House car park (NT members free)
food_drink_nearby: The Angel Hotel Llandeilo; The Salty Dog; Y Capel Bach Bistro
hazards_notes: NT entry required for park; cattle best kept wide of
